name: Bacterial Transformation
description: Heat-shock transformation: plasmid DNA is mixed with chemically competent E. coli, a brief 42 C heat shock drives uptake, cells recover and express the resistance marker, and selective plating yields transformed colonies, with a retry loop when no colonies appear.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Competent E. coli"]
    N2["Plasmid DNA (marker)"]
    N3["Selective agar + antibiotic"]
    N4["Mix DNA + cells on ice"]
    N5["Heat shock 42C, 45s"]
    N6["Return to ice"]
    N7["Recover in SOC, 37C 1h"]
    N8["Plate on selective agar"]
    N9["Incubate 37C overnight"]
    N10{"Colonies on plate?"}
    N11["Transformed colonies"]
    N12["Check competency/DNA"]

    N1 --> N4
    N2 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 --> N8
    N3 --> N8
    N8 --> N9
    N9 --> N10
    N10 -->|yes| N11
    N10 -->|no| N12
    N12 -->|retry| N4

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N11 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    style N12 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000

nodeDetails.label: Plasmid DNA (marker)
nodeDetails.detail: Plasmid carrying a selectable resistance marker

nodeDetails.label: Selective agar + antibiotic
nodeDetails.detail: Agar plates containing the selection antibiotic

nodeDetails.label: Mix DNA + cells on ice
nodeDetails.detail: Combine plasmid with competent cells; incubate on ice

nodeDetails.label: Heat shock 42C, 45s
nodeDetails.detail: Brief 42 C heat shock to promote DNA uptake

nodeDetails.label: Return to ice
nodeDetails.detail: Chill cells immediately after heat shock

nodeDetails.label: Recover in SOC, 37C 1h
nodeDetails.detail: Outgrowth in rich medium to express resistance

nodeDetails.label: Check competency/DNA
nodeDetails.detail: Troubleshoot cell competency and DNA quality

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

sources.title: Nonchromosomal antibiotic resistance in bacteria: genetic transformation of Escherichia coli by R-factor DNA
sources.authors: Cohen, S. N.; Chang, A. C.; Hsu, L.

sources.title: Studies on transformation of Escherichia coli with plasmids
Transformation of plasmid DNA into E. coli using the heat shock method
